aiCommentCN: 市场在沉默中酝酿风暴，散户在刷屏中练习禅定。
aiCommentEN: The market brews storms in silence, while retail investors practice zen by refreshing screens.
aiSummaryCN:
【多空格局】
比特币市场多空博弈激烈。
【多头理由】
多头认为BTC价格将反弹。
【空头理由】
空头认为市场恐慌情绪蔓延。
【市场展望】
短期内价格可能继续波动。
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
Bitcoin market is experiencing intense bullish and bearish struggles.
[Key Drivers]
Bullish investors believe BTC price will rebound.
[Outlook]
Bearish investors think market panic is spreading.
[Reminder]
Short-term price may continue to fluctuate.
